items.title: Ranch lovers, rejoice: Kraft to debut TSA‑friendly kit amid viral craze
items.dek: Kraft is leaning into international soccer fans’ newfound obsession with ranch dressing, announcing plans to debut a limited-edition “Kraft TSA‑Compliant Ranch”
items.body: Kraft is leaning into international soccer fans’ newfound obsession with ranch dressing, announcing plans to debut a limited-edition “Kraft TSA‑Compliant Ranch” kit aimed at travelers who apparently don’t want to leave the United States without the condiment. The first-of-its-kind kit includes a clear, TSA-approved quart-sized bag, a bulk stash of Kraft Ranch packets, enough to equal a standard bottle of dressing and then some submitted by /u/vandon [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Man wakes up from the dead and immediately tries to kiss the woman who saved him

items.title: US lifts naval blockade as Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal 'out of desperation'
items.dek: Iran's supreme leader says he disagrees with the deal and Donald Trump signed it "out of desperation".
items.body: Iran's supreme leader says he disagrees with the deal and Donald Trump signed it "out of desperation".
items.author: IriLine Desk
